title: Job Search Operating System, Experiments, and Sustainable Throughput · Hiring Signal Forensics
summary: A realistic job search operating system, experiments, and sustainable throughput artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in privacy-preserving search decision system and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Model discovery, research, decision, preparation, submission, follow-up, interview, offer, close, and archive states with next actions.
Store only decision-necessary opportunity, contact, consent, artifact revision, deadline, outcome, and learning data with retention rules.
Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Pipeline State
steps.instruction:
debug case — A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Model discovery, research, decision, preparation, submission, follow-up, interview, offer, close, and archive states with next actions.

Inspect the Pipeline State trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Pipeline State.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model discovery, research, decision, preparation, submission, follow-up, interview, offer, close, and archive states with next actions. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Pipeline State, keep Pipeline State connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Pipeline State, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Pipeline State, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Pipeline State precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Pipeline State, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Model discovery, research, decision, preparation, submission, follow-up, interview, offer, close, and archive states with next actions.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Pipeline State, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: A list of submitted applications is a complete search system.

options.text: The Pipeline State record says privacy-preserving search decision system looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Pipeline State.

For inspect the failure record, apply Pipeline State without its stated preconditions, omit the privacy-preserving search decision system trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Pipeline State for privacy-preserving search decision system.
The record names the assumption, applies Pipeline State, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
